results.title: Don Jr. marries Palm Beach socialite; president couldn't make it
results.description: Donald Trump Jr., the president’s eldest son, married Bettina Anderson, a Palm Beach socialite and influencer, on Thursday in West Palm Beach, Fla., according to Palm Beach County marriage records.The marriage certificate listed Brad McPherson, a real estate attorney who...

results.title: Donald Trump considering launching new strikes against Iran: Report
results.description: US President Donald Trump is \"seriously considering\" launching fresh strikes against Iran if last-minute negotiations do not result in a peace deal, states a report by US media outlet Axios.

results.title: Nigerians in American Politics: US Community Leader Explains
results.description: Leader of the United Nigerian Americans Council in Maryland, Dr Chris Ademiluyi, has said the organisation focuses on motivating and empowering members to become active participants in the democratic process. Ademiluyi said the community was created in 2019 to encourage more members of the community to register and vote, and to run for political offices [...] The post Nigerians in American Politics: US Community Leader Explains appeared first on Ghanamma.com .
